adapters.name: CQVIP Article Detail
adapters.script: (function(){function c(s){return (s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').replace(/^[-－:：,，;；\s]+|[-－:：,，;；\s]+$/g,'').trim()}function ma(n){return Array.from(document.getElementsByTagName('meta')).filter(function(x){var k=x.getAttribute('name')||x.getAttribute('property')||'';return k.toLowerCase()===n.toLowerCase()}).map(function(x){return c(x.getAttribute('content'))}).filter(Boolean)}function mf(a){for(var i=0;i<a.length;i++){var v=ma(a[i])[0];if(v)return v}return ''}function q(s){try{var e=document.querySelector(s);return c(e&&(e.getAttribute('content')||e.textContent))}catch(_){return ''}}function qs(s){try{return Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(s)).map(function(e){return c(e.textContent)}).filter(Boolean)}catch(_){return []}}function mt(t,r){var m=c(t).match(r);return m?c(m[1]||m[0]):''}function uniq(a){return a.map(c).filter(Boolean).filter(function(v,i,x){return x.indexOf(v)===i})}function ded(a){a=a.map(c).filter(Boolean);for(var n=1;n<=Math.floor(a.length/2);n++){if(a.length%n)continue;var ok=true;for(var i=n;i<a.length;i++){if(a[i]!==a[i%n]){ok=false;break}}if(ok)return a.slice(0,n)}return uniq(a)}function names(s){return c(s).replace(/等$/,'').split(/[\s,，、;；]+/).map(c).filter(function(v){return v&&v.length<=24&&!/^(作者|Author)$/.test(v)})}var body=c(document.body&&document.body.innerText||'');var title=mf(['citation_title'])||q('h1')||q('.article-title')||q('.detail-title')||q('.detailtitle')||q('.title');title=c(title.replace(/[-_—].*(维普|中文期刊服务平台|CQVIP).*$/i,''));var av=ma('citation_author');if(!av.length)av=qs('.author a,.authors a,[class*=author] a,a[href*=\"key=A\"],a[href*=\"Qikan/Search\"]');if(av.length===1)av=names(av[0]);var authors=ded(av);var journal=mf(['citation_journal_title'])||q('a[href*=\"/Qikan/Journal/Summary\"]')||q('.journal a')||q('.journal')||q('.source a')||q('.source')||mt(body,/《([^》]+)》/);var p=journal?body.slice(Math.max(0,body.indexOf(journal)),Math.max(body.indexOf(journal)+260,260)):body;var date=mf(['citation_publication_date','citation_date','citation_year'])||mt(p,/((?:19|20)\d{2})\s*年/)||mt(body,/((?:19|20)\d{2})\s*年/);var issue=mf(['citation_issue'])||mt(p,/(?:年第?|年\s*第)\s*([0-9A-Za-z增刊特刊-]+)\s*期/);var volume=mf(['citation_volume'])||mt(p,/第\s*([0-9A-Za-z]+)\s*卷/);var pages=mf(['citation_pages'])||mt(p,/([0-9]+[-－][0-9]+)(?:[,，]\s*共\s*[0-9]+\s*页)?/)||mt(body,/([0-9]+[-－][0-9]+)(?:[,，]\s*共\s*[0-9]+\s*页)?/);var doi=mf(['citation_doi'])||mt(body,/(10\.\d{4,9}\/[^\s，。；;]+)/);var abs=mf(['citation_abstract'])||q('.abstract')||q('#abstract')||q('[class*=abstract]')||mt(body,/摘要[：:]?\s*([\s\S]*?)(?=关键词|分类号|基金项目|作者简介|在线阅读|下载|$)/);abs=c(abs.replace(/^摘要[：:]?/,''));var kw=uniq(ma('citation_keywords').join(' ').split(/[\s,，;；]+/));if(!kw.length){var k=mt(body,/关键词[：:]?\s*([\s\S]*?)(?=分类号|基金项目|作者简介|在线阅读|下载|$)/);if(k)kw=uniq(k.split(/[\s,，;；]+/))}var r={title:title,authors:authors,doi:doi,journal:journal,volume:volume,issue:issue,pages:pages,date:date,abstract:abs,keywords:kw,url:location.href,siteName:location.hostname,itemType:'journalArticle',language:'zh',_sources:{siteAdapter:true,adapterId:'cqvip-article-detail'}};Object.keys(r).forEach(function(k){if(r[k]===''||(Array.isArray(r[k])&&!r[k].length)||r[k]==null)delete r[k]});return JSON.stringify(r)})()

adapters.name: Wanfang Periodical Detail
adapters.script: (function(){function c(s){return (s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').replace(/^[-－:：,，;；\s]+|[-－:：,，;；\s]+$/g,'').trim()}function ma(n){return Array.from(document.getElementsByTagName('meta')).filter(function(x){var k=x.getAttribute('name')||x.getAttribute('property')||'';return k.toLowerCase()===n.toLowerCase()}).map(function(x){return c(x.getAttribute('content'))}).filter(Boolean)}function mf(a){for(var i=0;i<a.length;i++){var v=ma(a[i])[0];if(v)return v}return ''}function q(s){try{var e=document.querySelector(s);return c(e&&(e.getAttribute('content')||e.textContent))}catch(_){return ''}}function qs(s){try{return Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(s)).map(function(e){return c(e.textContent)}).filter(Boolean)}catch(_){return []}}function mt(t,r){var m=c(t).match(r);return m?c(m[1]||m[0]):''}function uniq(a){return a.map(c).filter(Boolean).filter(function(v,i,x){return x.indexOf(v)===i})}var body=c(document.body&&document.body.innerText||'');var title=mf(['citation_title','dc.title'])||q('h1')||q('.title')||q('.detailTitle')||q('.paper-title');title=c(title.replace(/[-_—].*(万方|Wanfang).*$/i,''));var authors=uniq(ma('citation_author').concat(qs('.author a,.authors a,[class*=author] a,a[href*=\"author\"],a[href*=\"au=\"]'))).filter(function(v){return v.length<=24&&!/^(作者|Author)$/.test(v)});var journal=mf(['citation_journal_title'])||q('a[href*=\"periodical\"]')||q('.journal a')||q('.journal')||q('.source a')||q('.source')||mt(body,/《([^》]+)》/);var p=journal?body.slice(Math.max(0,body.indexOf(journal)),Math.max(body.indexOf(journal)+260,260)):body;var date=mf(['citation_publication_date','citation_date','citation_year'])||mt(p,/((?:19|20)\d{2})\s*年/)||mt(body,/((?:19|20)\d{2})\s*年/);var issue=mf(['citation_issue'])||mt(p,/(?:年第?|年\s*第)\s*([0-9A-Za-z增刊特刊-]+)\s*期/);var volume=mf(['citation_volume'])||mt(p,/第\s*([0-9A-Za-z]+)\s*卷/);var pages=mf(['citation_pages'])||mt(p,/([0-9]+[-－][0-9]+)(?:[,，]\s*共\s*[0-9]+\s*页)?/)||mt(body,/([0-9]+[-－][0-9]+)(?:[,，]\s*共\s*[0-9]+\s*页)?/);var doi=mf(['citation_doi'])||mt(body,/(10\.\d{4,9}\/[^\s，。；;]+)/);var abs=mf(['citation_abstract','description'])||q('.abstract')||q('#abstract')||q('[class*=abstract]')||mt(body,/摘要[：:]?\s*([\s\S]*?)(?=关键词|分类号|基金项目|作者简介|在线阅读|下载|$)/);var kw=uniq(ma('citation_keywords').join(' ').split(/[\s,，;；]+/));if(!kw.length){var k=mt(body,/关键词[：:]?\s*([\s\S]*?)(?=分类号|基金项目|作者简介|在线阅读|下载|$)/);if(k)kw=uniq(k.split(/[\s,，;；]+/))}var r={title:title,authors:authors,doi:doi,journal:journal,volume:volume,issue:issue,pages:pages,date:date,abstract:abs,keywords:kw,url:location.href,siteName:location.hostname,itemType:'journalArticle',language:'zh',_sources:{siteAdapter:true,adapterId:'wanfang-periodical-detail'}};Object.keys(r).forEach(function(k){if(r[k]===''||(Array.isArray(r[k])&&!r[k].length)||r[k]==null)delete r[k]});return JSON.stringify(r)})()

adapters.name: Highwire/Citation Meta Journal Page
adapters.script: (function(){function c(s){return (s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim()}function ma(n){return Array.from(document.getElementsByTagName('meta')).filter(function(x){var k=x.getAttribute('name')||x.getAttribute('property')||'';return k.toLowerCase()===n.toLowerCase()}).map(function(x){return c(x.getAttribute('content'))}).filter(Boolean)}function mf(a){for(var i=0;i<a.length;i++){var v=ma(a[i])[0];if(v)return v}return ''}function q(s){try{var e=document.querySelector(s);return c(e&&(e.getAttribute('content')||e.textContent))}catch(_){return ''}}function qs(s){try{return Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(s)).map(function(e){return c(e.textContent)}).filter(Boolean)}catch(_){return []}}function mt(t,r){var m=c(t).match(r);return m?c(m[1]||m[0]):''}function uniq(a){return a.map(c).filter(Boolean).filter(function(v,i,x){return x.indexOf(v)===i})}function ded(a){a=a.map(c).filter(Boolean);for(var n=1;n<=Math.floor(a.length/2);n++){if(a.length%n)continue;var ok=true;for(var i=n;i<a.length;i++){if(a[i]!==a[i%n]){ok=false;break}}if(ok)return a.slice(0,n)}return uniq(a)}var body=c(document.body&&document.body.innerText||'');var title=mf(['citation_title'])||q('h1')||q('.article-title')||q('.title');var authors=ded(ma('citation_author'));if(!authors.length)authors=ded(qs('.author a,.authors a,[class*=author] a'));var fp=mf(['citation_firstpage']),lp=mf(['citation_lastpage']);var pages=mf(['citation_pages'])||(fp?(lp&&lp!==fp?fp+'-'+lp:fp):'')||mt(body,/([0-9]+[-－][0-9]+)/);var doi=mf(['citation_doi'])||mt(body,/(10\.\d{4,9}\/[^\s，。；;]+)/);var date=mf(['citation_publication_date','citation_date','citation_year'])||mt(body,/((?:19|20)\d{2})/);var kws=[];ma('citation_keywords').forEach(function(v){kws=kws.concat(v.split(/[,，;；]\s*/))});var r={title:title,authors:authors,doi:doi,journal:mf(['citation_journal_title','citation_journal_abbrev']),volume:mf(['citation_volume']),issue:mf(['citation_issue']),pages:pages,date:date,abstract:mf(['citation_abstract'])||q('.abstract')||q('#abstract')||q('[class*=abstract]'),issn:mf(['citation_issn']),pdfURL:mf(['citation_pdf_url']),keywords:uniq(kws),url:location.href,siteName:location.hostname,itemType:'journalArticle',language:/[\u4e00-\u9fff]/.test(title+body.slice(0,300))?'zh':undefined,_sources:{siteAdapter:true,adapterId:'highwire-journal-page',highwire:true}};Object.keys(r).forEach(function(k){if(r[k]===''||(Array.isArray(r[k])&&!r[k].length)||r[k]==null)delete r[k]});return JSON.stringify(r)})()
